rows.label: qev085805_MSG0001
rows.name:
The Data Probe seems to be
operating without any issues.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085805_MSG0002
rows.name:
With this, the data from this region will
be reflected on Frontier Net as well.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085805_MSG0003
rows.name: It is all thanks to you. Thank you very much.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085805_MSG0004
rows.name:
I was deeply moved! You're even
better than the rumors say![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085805_MSG0005
rows.name:
No. We were only able to accomplish
this mission because of your teamwork.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085805_MSG0006
rows.name:
Mmm-mmm. Just as Tatsu thought, these
two... are highly suspicious mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085805_MSG0007
rows.name: Is it alright for us to return to NLA now?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085805_MSG0008
rows.name:
Yes. We will return after taking a few
more measurements from the Data Probe.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085805_MSG0009
rows.name: Understood. Everyone, let's head back first.[ST:wait ]
